title: Apprenticeships: March 2025
body: "These apprenticeship statistics for England cover the 2024 to 2025 academic year reported to date, August 2024 to January 2025.   The statistics cover learners aged 16 and over.  Also released are official statistics covering:   the apprenticeship service the Find an apprenticeship service achievement rates for apprenticeships for the 2023 to 2024 academic year  "
